name: voicebridge
description: Hands-free, two-way voice for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity) from your phone. Free, source-available, no ElevenLabs. Browser Web Speech (STT/TTS) + a tiny zero-dependency Node bridge that drives the agent CLI on your machine.

scripts.lint: eslint server.js test/*.js examples/**/*.js desktop/main.js desktop/preload.js desktop/lib/*.js desktop/renderer/*.js desktop/test/*.js
